name: Chicken Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken and beef bouillon cubes, water, celery salt, and onion powder in a bowl.
2. Mix the cornstarch with 1/2 cup of water until smooth.
3. Gradually add the cornstarch mixture to the bowl, stirring continuously until the gravy thickens.
4. Turn off the heat when the desired consistency is reached.
